summary: AI Assistant Saved Lesson Plans feature - All tests PASSED. Tested: 1) Content generation without cutoff (5118-7112 chars), 2) Save Plan button appears after generation, 3) Save functionality with toast notification, 4) Saved Plans tab displays saved plans, 5) Loading saved plans back into Generated Content, 6) Delete functionality, 7) Content persistence after navigation
seed_data_creation: Created test user and session via mongosh for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: AI Assistant Saved Plans feature fully working. History tab removed, replaced with 'Saved Plans' (Planes Guardados) tab. Save Plan button (green) appears after content generation. Full content displayed without cutoff.

generate_content.details: Returns full content (7112 chars for Fractions lesson plan)

get_generations.details: Returns saved plans with full content and is_saved=true

history_tab_removed.details: History tab no longer exists in UI

saved_plans_tab_exists.details: Saved Plans tab (Planes Guardados) visible with FolderOpen icon

content_generation.details: Generated 5118 char lesson plan on Multiplicación, displayed without cutoff

save_plan_button.details: Green 'Guardar Plan' button appears after content generation

save_toast_notification.details: '¡Plan guardado!' toast appears after clicking Save

saved_plans_counter.details: Header counter updates from 1 to 2 after saving

saved_plans_display.details: Saved plans show topic, type, subject, grade, date with Copy/Print/Delete buttons

load_saved_plan.details: Clicking saved plan loads content (5118 chars) and switches to Generate tab

delete_plan_ui.details: 'Plan eliminado' toast appears, plan removed from list

content_persistence.details: Content persists (6640 chars) after navigating to Dashboard and back

content_completeness.details: Full lesson plan with Objectives, Materials, Assessment, Differentiation, Closure sections
